plugins.name: hone
plugins.description: hone is a development model where a human writes a short Plan and an automated, worktree-native loop then builds, verifies, consolidates, reviews, and lands each change unattended; a scheduled garden loop (/hone:garden) cuts durable-layer drift between changes. Only rot-proof durable truth survives in the repo, and every cycle deletes something. Enforced by a PreToolUse guard, a Stop-hook gate and nag, two refute-first critics, and default-on land gates for consequential changes (authority) and real-environment proof.
